# Herzen Co.

Herzen Co. is a product leadership studio for founders, startups, and lean teams.

Primary offer:
- Fractional product leadership for teams that need senior product ownership before or instead of a full-time product hire.
- Flat subscription price: $2,000 per month for subscription-based clients.
- Core work: product audit, roadmap ownership, backlog prioritization, sprint rituals, stakeholder alignment, delivery risk tracking, and product metrics.

Supporting offers:
- Custom solutions: technical discovery, MVPs, prototypes, web applications, internal tools, launch support, and handoff.
- Custom project management solutions: heavier launch, operational, and cross-team delivery support when the work needs senior ownership.

Best-fit customers:
- Founder-led startups with product ambiguity or delivery drag.
- Teams between product hires.
- Companies with engineering capacity but unclear product ownership.
- Small and midsize businesses that need custom systems without the cost or overhead of a full development team.

Important pages:
- Home: https://herzenco.com/

- Custom Solutions: https://herzenco.com/custom-builds/
